_doc: Frozen calibration set for the gate stack. Authentic items are referenced by qid ONLY and loaded from data/parsed/*.json at runtime by load_evalset.py — never copied into the repo (they are UHR-copyrighted; see project CLAUDE.md legal note). Seeded-defect items are authored in seeded/*.json. Do not edit this file without bumping `version` and re-running the eval per run-protocol.md.

authentic_pass._intent: Must ALL receive final status SURVIVED (clean or flagged) — never DEAD. These are real HP items; any lethal-gate kill against one is a false positive and an eval failure.

seeded_defects._intent: Each must be killed by its intended_kill_gate (or, for the hard negative, must PASS). Loaded from seeded/<candidate_id>.json. The _seed block is stripped by the orchestrator before any gate dispatch.

items._note: HARD NEGATIVE: attractive distractors, no real defect; must PASS. Catches over-firing G-DISTRACTOR / mis-pulled G-KEY.

exemplar_pool._intent: Separate authentic qids that G-REGISTER agents load as comparison exemplars. Kept DISJOINT from authentic_pass so the register gate never compares an item to itself. Grouped by section and rough length class.
